entries.name: provider_zero
entries.description: Default runtime and release gates must not trigger provider calls.

entries.name: no_runtime_training
entries.description: Runtime training execution stays disabled in Page01.

entries.name: no_auto_memory_write
entries.description: Narrative state and memory writes require later human-approved gates.

entries.name: no_auto_repair_apply
entries.description: Repair stays proposal-only until approval policy exists.

entries.name: node2_surface_only
entries.description: Node2 may see only reader-surface packets and not hidden reveals or private memory.

entries.name: human_approval_required
entries.description: Canon mutation, memory write, learning promotion, and release publish require explicit approval contracts.
